_comment: Continuum example. Copy these blocks into your Claude Code settings.json and replace ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO with the path to your clone. On Windows, use 'py' or the full python.exe path.
_autocompact_note: Auto-compact is what triggers the automatic reset that re-injects your Checklist. It is ON by default; this line just asserts it stays on. Tune WHEN it fires with CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE in the env block below.
_env_note: Both env vars are OPTIONAL. CONTINUUM_WRAP: if you already run a status line, set it to your original command and Continuum's gauge appends to the END instead of replacing it. CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE: the percent-full (~60-83) at which Claude auto-compacts and your Checklist re-injects; lower = reset sooner and cleaner. Delete either line you do not need.
